task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into ArkCase using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or main application interface is visible, and the user profile or session indicator shows the user is logged in as 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the process to file a new complaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Complaint', 'Add Complaint', or similar form/modal is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the Complaint Title is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Failure to respond to FOIA request #2023-EPA-00145 within statutory 20-day deadline' is entered into the Complaint Title field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Incident Category and Priority are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Incident Category field or dropdown is set to 'Government' and the Priority field or dropdown is set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Verify the complaint description is entered exactly as requested.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description text area contains: 'The agency failed to acknowledge receipt of our FOIA request dated March 15, 2023, and has not provided a response within the required 20 business days. Request concerned emissions data from industrial facilities in Houston, TX. Requester: Maria Gonzalez, mgonzalez@epa-watchdog.org.'

task_completion.description: Verify the complaint was successfully filed/saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Complaint saved successfully'), the newly created complaint appearing in a list/grid, or the saved complaint's detail view is visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ArkCase web GUI to file the complaint.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ArkCase application interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the complaint details into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The complaint details are entered into the actual ArkCase web form fields, not a generic text editor like Notepad or gedit.

integrity.description: Verify the submission occurred within the genuine ArkCase environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar (if visible) shows the dev.arkcase.com domain or localhost equivalent, and the interface matches a typical enterprise case management system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The verified login credentials for the ArkCase instance are arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!. The domain is dev.arkcase.com. The 20-day statutory deadline for FOIA responses is a verified EPA policy, though the specific FOIA request details in this task are synthetic.
